document_manipulation.description: Attacks involving incomplete, blank, or manipulated documentation

attack_types.name: blank_document
attack_types.description: Completely blank utility bills or proof of address documents

attack_types.name: incomplete_document
attack_types.description: Documents missing critical fields (address, account number, date)

identity_fraud.description: Attacks involving mismatched or fabricated business identity information

attack_types.name: address_mismatch
attack_types.description: Utility bill address does not match registered company address

attack_types.name: name_mismatch
attack_types.description: Business name on documents differs from registered company name

attack_types.name: fake_registration
attack_types.description: Fabricated or invalid company registration numbers

digital_deception.description: Attacks involving fake or unverifiable online presence

attack_types.name: fake_website
attack_types.description: Pastebin, GitHub Pages, or expired domains posing as company website

attack_types.name: lookalike_domain
attack_types.description: Domain similar to legitimate company but with typos or variations

attack_types.name: no_online_presence
attack_types.description: No verifiable website or online presence for claimed business

temporal_manipulation.description: Attacks exploiting timing and date-related inconsistencies

attack_types.name: stale_documents
attack_types.description: Old or outdated documents submitted as proof

attack_types.name: future_dated_documents
attack_types.description: Documents with future dates indicating fabrication

edge_cases.description: Legitimate but ambiguous scenarios requiring manual review

categories.name: newly_registered
categories.description: Company registered less than 3 months ago

categories.name: virtual_office
categories.description: Business operating from shared or virtual office space

categories.name: dormant_company
categories.description: Company marked as dormant in Companies House

rule_based.description: Heuristic rules for catching common attack patterns

ml_based.description: Machine learning models trained on labeled fraud data

llm_based.description: Large language models for contextual document analysis

hybrid.description: Combination of rule-based, ML, and LLM approaches
